channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Yida Weng

item.title: Exploration in Reinforcement Learning
item.description: A practical guide to entropy-regularized PPO and RND — from the mathematical foundations of uncertainty-directed exploration to experimental results on Ant-v4

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description: My first blog post using Hugo and PaperMod theme
